Total Credits

• Students must receive a "C-" or better in all courses used for the minor. Of the 15 credits, 9 must be 300 or 400 level courses.

• An overall GPA of 2.0 in the minor is required for graduation.

• No more than 6 of the 15 credits toward the minor may be taken at an institution other than UMCP.

Chinese Language Minor 1
